name: CrispConnector
description: Connects to the Crisp customer messaging + helpdesk REST API (account, websites, conversations, people, helpdesk, campaigns) using HTTP Basic plugin credentials. Supports send-message, contact CRUD, conversation list/read, and KB sync of helpdesk articles + conversations + people.

install_fields.label: Plugin Identifier
install_fields.help: From Crisp Marketplace → your plugin → Tokens → Identifier. This is the Basic-auth username half.

install_fields.label: Plugin Key
install_fields.help: From Crisp Marketplace → your plugin → Tokens → Key. This is the Basic-auth password half — shown only once.

install_fields.label: Website ID
install_fields.help: Crisp website UUID — from Crisp app → Settings → Website Settings → Website ID. All site-scoped methods use this when no override is passed.

install_fields.label: API Tier
install_fields.help: X-Crisp-Tier header. 'plugin' for Marketplace-plugin tokens (most common); 'user' for personal user tokens.

install_fields.label: Crisp API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Crisp REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Crisp API requests per minute. Default is 60 (Crisp's documented plugin limit).

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates identifier, api_key and website_id and marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Crisp API connectivity by fetching the authenticated account profile.

apis.name: Get Account Profile
apis.description: GET /user/account — fetch the authenticated Crisp account profile.

apis.name: List Websites
apis.description: GET /user/websites — list Crisp websites the credential can access.

apis.name: List Conversations
apis.description: GET /website/{id}/conversations/{page} — paginated, optionally filtered conversation list.

apis.name: Send Message
apis.description: POST /website/{wid}/conversation/{sid}/message — send a message into a Crisp conversation. The Python parameter from_ is renamed to 'from' on the wire.

apis.name: List People
apis.description: GET /website/{id}/people/profiles/{page} — list contacts on a Crisp website.

apis.name: Create Person
apis.description: POST /website/{id}/people/profile — create a new Crisp contact.

apis.name: List Helpdesk Articles
apis.description: GET /website/{id}/helpdesk/locale/{locale}/articles/{page} — list helpdesk articles for a locale.
